fix1_imageAspectRatio.description: Image inner frame: aspect-[4/3] md:aspect-auto md:h-full → aspect-[4/3] (consistent ratio all breakpoints)
fix1_imageAspectRatio.method: Code review (card-tribe_events.php line 37) + DOM selectors + visual screenshots at 1440px and 375px
fix1_imageAspectRatio.codeConfirmed: Line 37: 'relative flex flex-col items-end w-full overflow-hidden rounded-xl p-2 aspect-[4/3]' — md:aspect-auto and md:h-full removed

domConfirmed.aspect-43-only: found: true in all 6 event-bearing sections, count matches article count
domConfirmed.no-aspect-auto: found: false across all 7 sections (0 matches site-wide)
domConfirmed.no-h-full: found: false across all 7 sections (0 matches site-wide)

visualConfirmed.1440px: Image panels are substantial 4:3 proportion panels — not thin strips. Left image half occupies a wide, clearly rectangular 4:3 box alongside the content half at desktop width.
visualConfirmed.375px: Image panels maintain 4:3 aspect ratio on mobile — wide constrained boxes stacked above content panels. Consistent behavior across breakpoints as intended.

fix2_contentSpacing.description: Content half: removed justify-between, added mb-6 to text group for spacing before CTA
fix2_contentSpacing.method: Code review (card-tribe_events.php lines 58-59) + DOM selectors + visual screenshots
fix2_contentSpacing.codeConfirmed: Line 58: content half div is 'md:w-1/2 bg-dark-pattern rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col text-white' (justify-between removed). Line 59: text group is 'flex flex-col gap-2 mb-6' (mb-6 added).

domConfirmed.content-flex-col: found: true in all 6 event-bearing sections — confirms flex-col without justify-between
domConfirmed.text-group-mb6: found: true in all 6 event-bearing sections, count matches article count
domConfirmed.no-justify-between: found: false across all 7 sections (0 matches site-wide)

visualConfirmed.1440px: Clear visible gap between excerpt text and VIEW EVENT arrow button. The mb-6 (24px) spacing creates proper visual separation between the text group and CTA.
visualConfirmed.375px: Button spacing from text group visible on mobile as well.

build.detail: taktician_validate_all passed. 0 build errors, 0 lint errors in FeaturedEvents files. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks — unchanged.

tsxPhpSync.detail: All sync checks pass. Root wrapper mismatch warning is the known false positive. No regressions.

imageAspectConsistency.detail: aspect-[4/3] applied uniformly at all breakpoints. md:aspect-auto and md:h-full both absent from the DOM (0 matches site-wide). Image panel presents as a substantial 4:3 box at both 375px and 1440px viewport widths.

ctaSpacing.detail: justify-between removed from content half (flex-col only). mb-6 present on text group, creating 24px bottom margin that separates excerpt text from the btn-tertiary CTA. Visually confirmed at both breakpoints.

additionalObservation.description: h3 now carries additional classes 'md:text-[3rem] md:leading-[1.1]' alongside text-header-2 (line 60). This pins desktop title to exactly 3rem/48px with tighter line-height, overriding any breakpoint scaling in text-header-2. Not in the fix description but is a non-breaking additive refinement. No issues raised.

noRegressions.detail: All checks from prior PASS runs remain green: HTTP 200, no JS errors, no overflow, 7 block instances in demo-containers, 3 future events (ASC) and 2 past events (DESC), postsLimit honored, buttonLabel passthrough, hideIfEmpty, correct permalinks, venue names (Rogers Arena, BC Place Stadium, Vancouver Convention Centre), bg-dark-pattern on card halves, date badges (flex ml-auto bottom-right), btn-tertiary-arrow present, images srcset/lazy/dimensions, h3 not uppercase, headingSize=2 on ThemeHeading.

findings: Image panels are substantial 4:3 proportion — clearly not a thin strip at desktop
CTA button has clear visible gap from excerpt text above (mb-6 spacing evident)
Side-by-side card layout renders cleanly, cards size to content height
Date badges visible bottom-right of image frames
Venue names and excerpts visible in content halves
Image panels maintain 4:3 aspect ratio on mobile — consistent with desktop
Cards stack vertically: image panel above content panel
CTA button spacing from text group visible on mobile
No overflow or layout breakage at 375px

passedChecks: Build passes — 0 errors, 0 lint issues in FeaturedEvents
TSX/PHP sync validated — all checks pass
Image inner frame: aspect-[4/3] only — md:aspect-auto and md:h-full absent (0 DOM matches)
4:3 image panels substantial and consistent at both 1440px and 375px — visually confirmed
justify-between removed from content half — 0 DOM matches site-wide
mb-6 on text group present in all event-bearing sections — visually confirmed CTA spacing
